message:
perf(grapheme_pool): add HashMap index for O(1) intern() lookup

Replace linear scan in intern() with O(1) HashMap lookup. The pool now
maintains a string→slot_id index that is kept in sync with allocations
and deallocations.

Changes:
- Add `index: HashMap<String, u32>` field to GraphemePool
- Update alloc() to insert into index when allocating
- Update intern() to use HashMap::get() instead of linear search
- Add doc comments clarifying alloc() vs intern() semantics

This improves performance for workloads with many repeated graphemes,
such as rendering large text buffers with common characters.

Also includes input parser updates for additional terminal sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
